requested_slug: etoken-安全簽章系統技術說明

advisory.reason: Baseline threshold (0.3) already yielded 50 nodes. Lowering threshold is likely unnecessary noise.

pilot_evaluation.reason: Uncertain topology or borderline metrics - Manual calibration needed.

model_policy_reason: Production Policy v1: Haiku-only due to graph density ceiling

questions.question: What are the main components of the eToken system and how do they interact?
questions.justification: The synthesis text describes the main components of the eToken system (eToken Server, Dongle Server, GLBin) and how they coordinate to perform the various steps of the signing process.

questions.question: What are the different signing algorithms supported by the eToken system?
questions.justification: The synthesis text mentions that the file assembly format in the final stage depends on the signing algorithm used, which can be ECDSA, RSA, or RSA + HID.

questions.question: What are the specific commands and parameters used in the GLBinTool?
questions.justification: The synthesis text provides detailed information on the GLBinTool commands and their parameters for the different steps of the signing process.
